welcome_message: 👋 Hello, {name}! I'm a bot for monitoring Minecraft servers. I can show you any server's status or track it in your chat. 🔹 DM Commands: /info <ip> — Server information /players <ip> — Player list 🔹 Group Commands: /set_chat_server <ip> — Bind a server /server_conf — Monitoring settings Choose an action below:
choose_language: 🌐 Пожалуйста, выберите язык / Please choose your language:
ssrf_blocked: This address is blocked. Pinging local and private networks is not allowed.
anti_scan_blocked: You have exceeded the port limit for this IP address. Anti-scan protection triggered.
dns_failed: Could not resolve server address {address}. Please check the domain or IP.
cooldown_alert:
⏳ Data was recently updated.
Next refresh available in {seconds} sec.
group_only_error: ❌ This command only works in groups.
server_bind_success:
✅ Server successfully bound to this chat!
Settings: /server_conf
no_server_bound_error: ⚠️ No server is bound to this chat. An admin can use /set_chat_server.
players_hidden: 👥 Players: {count}. List is hidden by the server.
help_text: ❓ MineTracker Help Here you can find information about the bot's features and how to use it. Choose a section:
features_text: 🚀 Bot Features 🔹 Free Access: • Ping any server: /info, /players • Monitor 1 server in a chat (updates every 5 min) • Customize display: MOTD, IP, version, ping, players 🔹 Premium Access (coming soon): • Monitor up to 5 servers • Updates every 2 minutes • Minecraft mod integration • Game ↔ Telegram chat bridge • Advanced analytics
about_text: ℹ️ About MineTracker MineTracker is a bot for real-time Minecraft server monitoring. How to use: 1. Type /info <server ip> to check status 2. Add the bot to a group and use /set_chat_server for monitoring 3. Configure display with /server_conf Contact developer: @OpenClawMarkTin
link_expired: ⏳ Link expired, please send the command again.
